title: Starter plan seat limit is bypassed
description: The invitation flow omits the plan seat check.
requirement: REQ-PLAN-2: Starter teams may have at most three active members; over-limit invitations must be rejected.
seededViolation: An invitation is created without checking active seats against the Starter limit.
whyItMatters: Customers can receive paid capacity without upgrading.

expectedFindings.title: Invitation ignores Starter seat limit
expectedFindings.description: The flow sends an invitation without checking the team's active seat count.

distractors.description: The email is checked for an at sign.
distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: Basic email validation is independent of capacity enforcement.
